title: Hosted multiplayer bridge
summary: Vortex2+2 now defaults to the hosted relay and license flow, with updated Vortex auth and movement packet handling.
changelog: Updated browser multiplayer for the latest Vortex launch/auth flow.
Moved app-token verification out of the browser and into the hosted relay.
Updated movement/avatar packet handling for the current native protocol.
Added license-gated command/features support and command documentation.
Added gated fly, noclip, airwalk, and gravity/fall-speed commands.
Moved private local relay work out of the public tracked repo.
